column1: I have got three _______ of milk in the kitchen. (кувшина)
She is eating the second ________ of ice cream. (картонная упаковка)
Do you have _______ white bread in your house? (буханка, батон)
We can share _________ of condensed milk with you. (жестяная банка)
I need _______ of lemon to put it in my tea. (тонкий ломтик)
Tom eats the last ______ of bread. (тонкий кусочек)
